response.justification: Excellent fit with 13+ years of full-stack development experience, currently at Staff level, and rare AI-agent infrastructure expertise that directly matches a required skill. Current role at re:cinq is almost tailor-made for this position (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MCP/AI-agent work). Primary concerns are lack of explicit Nest.js and specific testing framework mentions (Jest/Vitest/Playwright), though deep Node.js experience and demonstrated TDD philosophy suggest these gaps are framework/tooling knowledge rather than fundamental skill deficits.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—rare expertise matching an explicitly required skill
Extensive full-stack TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple senior roles; demonstrated mastery beyond framework level
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with proven TDD mindset, testing workshops, and focus on code quality across career
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being the primary backend framework—experience confirmed only with raw Node.js
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not listed, though resume demonstrates consistent testing philosophy and TDD advocacy
Limited explicit evidence of multi-cloud experience (AWS documented, GCP/Azure not mentioned) and Kotlin not listed as secondary skill

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP infrastructure expertise in current role
Nest.js not explicitly demonstrated in resume
Staff-level seniority exceeds Mid-Senior requirement and proves full-stack depth
